name: The Case Against Adnan Syed
overview: Explore the 1999 disappearance and murder of 18-year-old Baltimore County high school student Hae Min Lee, and the subsequent conviction of her ex-boyfriend, Adnan Syed, a case brought to global attention by the hugely popular Serial podcast.

trailers.title: The Case Against Adnan Syed (2019) | Official Trailer | HBO
